field_values.action_summary: Realizing the danger, Carter uses his telepathic abilities to intercept the nine thought-waves required to operate the factory doors, allowing him and Woola to flee the facility.
field_values.camera_intent: Tight close-ups on eyes and facial strain; Dynamic movement shots of fleeing characters; Wide shots of massive industrial doors opening
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Synchronization between mental effort peaks and mechanical door movement
Timing of the nine thought-wave interceptions relative to door activation
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH020_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes escape sequence where the protagonist utilizes evolving telepathic abilities to manipulate industrial machinery. The scene must visually communicate the mental strain of intercepting nine distinct thought-waves and synchronize this effort with the mechanical movement of massive factory doors.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- woola
- the_old_man (off-screen/pursuing)

## Required Environments
- atmosphere_factory (Doorway/Exit mechanism)

## Continuity Constraints
- Synchronization between mental effort peaks and mechanical door movement
- Timing of the nine thought-wave interceptions relative to door activation

## Beat List
- BT001: Realization of danger and need for telepathy
- BT002: Telepathic interception of nine thought-waves
- BT003: Door operation and escape
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
